description: The Clan Gionta is a Camorra criminal organization based in Torre Annunziata, Italy. It emerged in the early 1980s under boss Valentino Gionta, engaging in cigarette smuggling, heroin trafficking, and control of the fish market. The clan was known for its violent conflicts with other Camorra groups and was heavily targeted by law enforcement, leading to the arrest of Valentino Gionta in 1985. Despite setbacks, the clan remains active with leadership passing to various members.

country_links.evidence_quote: Umberto Onda, super ricercato tra i 100 latitanti più pericolosi, è stato acciuffato dai militari dell'Arma coordinati dal tenente colonnello Andrea Paris al porto di Brindisi, il latitante proveniva dalla Grecia assieme ad alcuni amici.
country_links.context: A fugitive from the clan was arrested at the port of Brindisi after coming from Greece.

country_links.evidence_quote: Aldo Gionta era in procinto di recarsi a Malta come latitante
country_links.context: Aldo Gionta was about to go to Malta as a fugitive.

country_links.evidence_quote: Tra le accuse vi è il traffico dai Paesi Bassi di cocaina , hashish , marijuana .
country_links.context: The clan traffics cocaine, hashish, and marijuana from the Netherlands.
